issue_summary: Session gets stuck on waiting for agent or fails to connect
notes: Users report connection issues on mobile and laptop before the interview begins

issue_summary: Session exits or ends unexpectedly
notes: A few users said the interview ended before they could really begin or complete a response

issue_summary: Mic or device handling is fragile
notes: Interruptions happen around mic setup or headphone switching

issue_summary: Laptop layout could be improved
notes: Some users want a larger less card-constrained layout

issue_summary: Tap-to-speak behavior is not intuitive
notes: The interaction is unclear and may move the flow forward unexpectedly

issue_summary: Controls near the mic are confusing
notes: One example is confusion about the keyboard icon next to the microphone

issue_summary: Speech-to-text misrecognizes student speech
notes: Students report spoken answers being transcribed incorrectly even when they speak clearly

issue_summary: Language detection is weak for mixed English Tamil speech
notes: English is sometimes rendered incorrectly or shown in Tamil

issue_summary: Answers are not captured or submitted reliably
notes: System sometimes behaves as if the student did not answer

issue_summary: Flow skips to the next question before current answer is accepted
notes: Students report sudden progression without recording the current answer

issue_summary: Voice recording is unreliable
notes: Recording appears enabled but speech is not consistently captured

issue_summary: Audio clarity is poor
notes: Students mention unclear loud or hard to hear assistant audio

issue_summary: Response latency is noticeable
notes: Users mention slow response time loading delay or taking time states

issue_summary: Students want live subtitles or visible text while speaking
notes: Users want captured text to be visible before or while sending

issue_summary: User message bubble or typed text is not always visible
notes: Students say what they type or speak does not show consistently

issue_summary: Students want stop pause or delete controls for voice input
notes: Users want to correct mistakes before submission

issue_summary: Sana sometimes responds to a different meaning than the student intended
notes: Users say they speak one thing and get a different response

issue_summary: Sana sometimes feels repetitive or scripted
notes: Conversation can feel like a fixed set of questions

issue_summary: Sana sometimes continues on the same topic without understanding the user
notes: Agent keeps talking in one direction despite user input change

issue_summary: Some students found Sana friendly and easy to talk to
notes: Positive feedback says the interaction feels approachable and clear

issue_summary: Users cannot easily recover after a failed or interrupted session
notes: Some users could not reattempt after an unexpected exit or failed run

issue_summary: Exit or end-call action is hard to find
notes: Ending the conversation is not obvious in the interface
